patterns: What unique features does your website offer?
Why should I use your website?
responses: Planning a trip has never been easier! With Travelfika, you can book flights, reserve hotels, and plan attractions-all in one seamless itinerary. No more juggling multiple bookings-everything is in one place for a stress-free travel experience!

Yes! 📱🎉 The Travelfika app lets you book and manage your trips effortlessly. Available on both the App Store and Google Play Store, it's your all-in-one travel companion. Download now and plan your next adventure with ease!

patterns: What payment methods do you accept?
What are the payment options in India and the US?
responses:
We accept multiple payment methods to make things easy for you!💳

✅ In India: Credit Card, Debit Card, Netbanking, and UPI.

✅ In US: Credit Card and Debit Card.

⚠️ Currently, we do not accept crypto payments or EMI options, but we plan to add these options in the future.
Currently, we don't offer travel insurance with our bookings. However, if you have any other questions or need assistance with your trip, just let us know-we're happy to help!

responses: Absolutely! 🤖 Travelfika uses AI to make your travel planning effortless. Our AI-powered Trip Planner curates personalized itineraries based on your interests, and our chatbot Anah is here 24/7 to assist with bookings, questions, and travel tips. Smart, simple, and stress-free!
